_note: Every value traces to data/dossier/able/dossier.json (source SRC-12, ARES primary VR record). legalName ← identity 'Legal name' (VERIFIED_PRIMARY). ico ← identity 'IČO'. address ← identity 'Registered office'. statutoryBody ← governance.statutoryBody, CURRENT jednatels only (Petr Faraga excluded — 'until 13 October 2020', historical). owners ← governance.shareholders current capitalization table (12 holders summing to 100.00%); order preserved as listed in the dossier. NOT DERIVABLE AS AN EXPLICIT FIELD: 'status':'active' — the dossier has no literal active/dissolved lifecycle flag; 'active' is an evidence-backed inference from EU VIES VAT 'Valid' (SRC-08), ongoing register activity (last register change observed 2 April 2026, SRC-12) and no dissolution/insolvency on record (ISIR lookup was BLOCKED, not negative). It is the current published-state baseline, not a fabricated register value.
